entity.summary: Singapore-founded digital-asset platform providing OTC trading, payments, fiat and crypto ramping, swaps, and related institutional services.
entity.notes: Modeled as hybrid because current operations span OTC trading, payments, ramps, and digital-asset swap services. The first-party site states launch in 2013 and identifies Singapore as the founding and principal operating origin.

evidence.title: COINUT official digital asset platform
evidence.notes: First-party site describes current OTC, payment, ramp, and swap services, provides Singapore corporate details, and states a 2013 launch milestone.

evidence.title: Coinut exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source corroborates the Coinut exchange identity.
